vehicles.slot: Under air filter housing — short rod on transmission module with two flat sides
shift: Open hood. Locate air filter housing.
The shift override rod is on the transmission module near/under the air filter box.
Rod has two flat sides. Use an open-ended wrench.
Turn the rod clockwise approximately 30 degrees against resistance.
Hold until the parking pawl releases (you will feel it disengage).
Vehicle will roll — confirm N and secure.
neutral: Restore power. Manual shift to N, or use the rod method above.
AUTOMATIC: do NOT flat-tow. Lift front wheels only.
vehicles.notes: AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION: cannot be flat-towed under any circumstances — will destroy transmission. MANUAL: depress clutch, select N.
vehicles.warn: AUTOMATIC: NEVER flat-tow. LIFT FRONT WHEELS ONLY. Automatic transmission not equipped with oil pump when not running.
vehicles.towMethod: LIFT FRONT WHEELS (wheel-lift or flatbed). Rear wheels roll on ground. NEVER flat-tow automatic.
towNotes: AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION: has no pump for lubrication when engine is off. Flat-towing or towing with front wheels on ground destroys transmission.
MANUAL: can flat-tow or tow any direction — select Neutral, clutch in.
Small, light vehicle — watch clearance during loading.

battery.warnings: AUTOMATIC: never flat-tow. Front lift only.

knownIssues.title: Automatic Transmission Destroyed by Flat-Towing
knownIssues.detail: The R50/R53 automatic MINI Cooper uses a CVT or Aisin 6-speed that has no internal lubrication pump when the engine is not running. Flat-towing or towing with driven (front) wheels on the ground will destroy the transmission in minutes. ALWAYS lift the front (drive) wheels.

vehicles.slot: Shift interlock solenoid — access via console near shifter base. Brake light switch controls system.
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start).
Locate shift lock override slot near shifter base — small cap or access point.
Remove cap. Insert key, press down.
Press brake pedal. Move selector to N.
Replace cap.
MANUAL: depress clutch, select N — no shift lock.
neutral: Battery location varies: under hood or trunk depending on model.
Connect jump pack to accessible terminals.
AUTOMATIC: front lift only — never flat-tow.
vehicles.notes: AUTOMATIC: front lift only. MANUAL: any direction.
vehicles.warn: AUTOMATIC: NEVER flat-tow. Front wheels must be lifted.
vehicles.towMethod: AUTOMATIC: LIFT FRONT WHEELS ONLY. MANUAL: any tow method acceptable.
towNotes: Automatic transmission lacks lubrication when not running — front lift mandatory.
Manual: standard neutral selection, can tow any direction.
vehicles.steeringLock: Key-operated or electronic steering lock (push-button start on some).

battery.location: Under hood (most). Convertible may have alternate location.
battery.warnings: Automatic: front lift only. Never flat-tow automatic.

vehicles.trans: 7-speed dual-clutch (DCT) or 8-speed automatic; Cooper SE EV available
vehicles.slot: Electronic shifter — mechanical release under console near selector base
shift: Locate override slot under console trim near selector base.
Remove trim panel if necessary.
Insert key. Press override plunger.
Press brake. Move selector to N.
Cooper SE EV: restore 12V power first — use frunk/hood 12V terminals.
neutral: Battery under hood or engine compartment.
Cooper SE EV: 12V battery under hood in front storage area.
AUTOMATIC/DCT: front lift only. SE EV: FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.notes: Cooper SE EV: FLATBED ONLY. Automatic/DCT: front lift only, never flat-tow.
vehicles.warn: Cooper SE EV: FLATBED ONLY. Automatic: front lift only — never flat-tow.
vehicles.towMethod: Gas automatic/DCT: LIFT FRONT WHEELS ONLY. Cooper SE EV: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Cooper SE EV: electric drivetrain, flatbed only, 12V auxiliary in engine area.
Automatic/DCT: no lubrication without engine running — front lift only.
Never flat-tow any automatic or DCT MINI.

epb.override: Restore 12V under hood. Hold EPB button to release.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood 12V terminals.
Cooper SE EV: use frunk/hood 12V terminal area.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard or frunk area (SE EV)
battery.warnings: Automatic: front lift only. SE EV: flatbed only, 12V only.

vehicles.slot: Center console — mechanical override near selector base
shift: Locate override slot near selector base on center console.
Remove cap. Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move to N.
ALL4 AWD: confirm tow method — flatbed required.
PHEV: restore 12V power first.
neutral: Battery under hood (R60) or rear of engine compartment / driver side under cover (F60).
ALL4: flatbed only. PHEV: 12V only, flatbed only.
vehicles.notes: ALL4 AWD: FLATBED ONLY. PHEV: flatbed only, 12V only.
vehicles.warn: ALL4 AWD: FLATBED ONLY. PHEV: 12V only, flatbed only. Automatic: front lift for FWD.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD automatic: lift front wheels only. ALL4 AWD: FLATBED ONLY. PHEV ALL4: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: ALL4 AWD: no transfer case neutral — flatbed mandatory.
PHEV: HV system present, 12V auxiliary only, flatbed only.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Hold EPB button to release.

battery.location: Under hood or rear engine compartment (varies by gen/trim)
battery.warnings: ALL4: flatbed only. PHEV: 12V only, flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Center console — mechanical override slot near selector base
shift: Find override slot near selector base.
Remove cap. Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move to N.
ALL4: flatbed only.
vehicles.notes: ALL4 AWD: flatbed only. Automatic FWD: front lift only.
vehicles.warn: ALL4 AWD: flatbed only. Automatic FWD: front lift only, never flat-tow.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD automatic: lift front wheels only. ALL4 AWD: FLATBED ONLY.

battery.warnings: ALL4: flatbed only. Automatic: front lift only.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral.
vehicles.notes: Paceman R61: FWD or ALL4 AWD. Roadster R59: RWD roadster. Manual: depress clutch.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. RWD (R59): lift from rear. ALL4 AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front. RWD: lift from rear. ALL4 AWD: flatbed preferred.

vehicles.slot: Electronic toggle selector — no mechanical shift lock slot
shift: Turn vehicle to ON/Ready mode.
The Cooper SE uses a toggle-style electronic selector.
Press and hold the N (Neutral) position on the toggle for 3 seconds while pressing the brake.
Confirm N on the instrument cluster.
If power is lost: restore 12V auxiliary battery first — battery is under the hood.
neutral: Connect jump pack to 12V auxiliary battery — under the hood.
12V AUXILIARY ONLY — NEVER touch the HV battery.
Once 12V is restored, toggle selector to N.
vehicles.notes: Electric FWD only. 12V auxiliary under hood. HV battery under floor. Flatbed only.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V auxiliary ONLY — never touch HV battery.
towNotes: 12V auxiliary under hood — never touch HV battery under floor.

battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. Never touch HV battery.
